destinations.evidence: Error logging formats the requested bounded request details and includes them in log_tx_error calls for registry and signature-verification failures.

equivalence_argument: The diagnostic formatter includes all required request fields and truncates input/output to 100 hex characters plus ellipsis before log_tx_error receives the message.
rationale: The commit adds format_request_details, which hex-encodes and truncates precompile input/output and formats the key request fields into a single diagnostic string. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: SPC verification error logging must include block, transaction, executor, precompile, previous block, timeout, success/error, input, output, and proof length details, while truncating input and output hex strings to 100 characters plus ellipsis when longer.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build an SpcVerificationRequest with long input/output and assert format_request_details includes the named fields, input/output truncated to the first 100 hex characters followed by ellipsis, and proof_len equal to the proof byte length.
summary: SPC error logs include bounded request details.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create a request with long input/output and assert the formatted log message includes all named fields with input and output truncated after 100 hex characters.
title: SPC error logs include bounded request details
